grant_title: Philadelphia District Attorney’s Office Forfeiture Fund 2026 – Summer Camps, Cycling, Swimming & Athletic Programs
geographic_restrictions: Organizations must be operating in the city and county of Philadelphia.
project_area: Anti-crime, anti-drug, anti-violence initiatives focused on summer camps, cycling, swimming, and athletic programs for Philadelphians.
demographic_requirements: Programs must help Philadelphians escape poverty and avoid crime and drug addiction to live productive, successful, and fulfilling lives.
eligibility_summary: Eligible applicants are 501(c)(3) nonprofits or fiscally sponsored organizations operating in Philadelphia with a track record of delivering relevant programming. Previous grantees must have completed funded programs, expended all funds, and submitted final reports. Priority is given to organizations with annual operating budgets at or below $950,000.
